sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_crc (id UInt32, data String, checksum UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_crc (id, data, checksum) VALUES (1, 'Hello, World!', CRC32IEEE('Hello, World!'));
UPDATE test_crc SET checksum = CRC32IEEE(data) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, data, checksum FROM test_crc WHERE checksum = CRC32IEEE('Hello, World!');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_crc WHERE checksum = 1234567890;
